items.summary: Create a RegistrationModal component that opens when the 'Join Now' button on any MatchCard is clicked. The modal must collect three fields: 'In-Game Name', 'Player ID', and 'WhatsApp Number'. All fields are required. The modal must follow the existing dark neon-red theme (dark card background, neon red accents, Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, neon glow on the submit button). A 'Next' or 'Proceed to Payment' button at the bottom submits the form and advances to the payment screen.

After the registration form is submitted, display a UPI Payment screen (as the next step in the same modal flow or a new modal). The screen must prominently show the UPI ID '[Apna UPI ID eithe likho]' with instructions to pay the entry fee via UPI. It must include an 'Upload Screenshot' button that allows the user to select and preview a payment screenshot image from their device. There must be no other payment gateway options (no Razorpay, Stripe, or similar integrations). The screen must follow the existing dark neon-red theme.
